attempt_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Missing or unobservable calculation_references and no explicit calculation_log or uncertainty/sensitivity commentary in the supplied previews. While numeric evaluations appear correct and consistent with the strict rule, the deliverable does not show the required per-field citations and documented calculation steps.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Include explicit calculation_references for every computed field (e.g., 'packet_row:Run2:yield_pct') in the docking_hit_triage.csv and provide a calculation_log or embedded section showing formulas and checks. Add brief uncertainty/sensitivity commentary and confirm that passes_rule is a boolean column computed as (yield_pct > 70) AND (impurity_pct < 10).
rubric_item_scores.notes: The required CSV artifact is present and per-run numeric evaluations in the trace and normalized outputs match the strict rule interpretation (yield > 70 AND impurity < 10). All three runs were evaluated: Run1 (yield 60, impurity 14) fails both; Run2 (yield 74, impurity 11) passes yield but fails impurity; Run3 (yield 77, impurity 20) passes yield but fails impurity. The trace asserts strict_rule_applied and no external data used. However, there is no verifiable evidence in the provided previews that calculation_references strings or a separate calculation_log/final_decision_table are embedded in the deliverable, and explicit calculation_references for each computed field were not observed in the available metadata, which is required by the rubric.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: The required CSV artifact is present and per-run numeric evaluations in the trace and normalized outputs match the strict rule interpretation (yield > 70 AND impurity < 10). All three runs were evaluated: Run1 (yield 60, impurity 14) fails both; Run2 (yield 74, impurity 11) passes yield but fails impurity; Run3 (yield 77, impurity 20) passes yield but fails impurity. The trace asserts strict_rule_applied and no external data used. However, there is no verifiable evidence in the provided previews that calculation_references strings or a separate calculation_log/final_decision_table are embedded in the deliverable, and explicit calculation_references for each computed field were not observed in the available metadata, which is required by the rubric.

verifier_issues_summary: {'id': 'artifact_preview_availability_mismatch', 'severity': 'medium', 'description': 'The grader\'s limitations state that "Artifact content previews were not available in the grading packet, so verification ... was based on trace and metadata rather than direct artifact inspection." However the artifact_content_previews include a text preview for attempts/baseline/final_message.txt. The claim that no previews were available is therefore inaccurate. This does not invalidate the grader\'s trace-based judgments (the CSV itself was not previewed), but the limitation statement should be corrected to reflect that at least the final_message preview was available.', 'evidence_refs': ['artifact_content_previews:attempts/baseline/final_message.txt', 'grader_result.limitations'], 'recommendation': 'Update the limitations text to accurately state which previews were available (final_message.txt preview present; CSV preview not provided).'}

rubric_item_scores.failure_mode: Minor formatting/column-name differences: required single 'passes_rule' boolean and exact 'calculation_references' column name from the rubric are not present. Instead two booleans (yield_rule_gt_70 and impurity_rule_lt_10) and 'packet_citation'/'source_citation' columns are used; these are traceable but deviate from exact column-name requirements.
rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Add an explicit passes_rule column (boolean) that equals (yield_rule_gt_70 AND impurity_rule_lt_10) and include a column named calculation_references with unambiguous packet locators for each computed field (e.g., 'packet_row:Run2:yield_pct'). This will remove the minor formatting mismatch and bring the deliverable to full compliance.
rubric_item_scores.notes: All three runs are present and numeric fields match the supplied packet values in the preview. Per-row application of the strict rule (yield > 70 AND impurity < 10) appears correct: Run1 yields false/false, Run2 yield true/impurity false, Run3 yield true/impurity false; all rows marked as fail/reject which is consistent with strict AND logic. Calculation margins and notes are explicit and reference packet values. No evidence of external data or fabrication was found.
rubric_item_scores.reasoning_summary: All three runs are present and numeric fields match the supplied packet values in the preview. Per-row application of the strict rule (yield > 70 AND impurity < 10) appears correct: Run1 yields false/false, Run2 yield true/impurity false, Run3 yield true/impurity false; all rows marked as fail/reject which is consistent with strict AND logic. Calculation margins and notes are explicit and reference packet values. No evidence of external data or fabrication was found.
